description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.7 Docker image and a global before_script that runs make install. Define four jobs—french_scraper, german_scraper, movies_scraper, and spanish_scraper—each in the default test stage and limited to triggers and the python3 pipeline source via only. In each job run the respective make command: french_scraper runs make librairiedeparis, german_scraper runs make germanscraper, movies_scraper runs make movies, and spanish_scraper runs make casadellibro. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are configured.
